data.title: Amazon Blasts Lawsuit Over Alleged Slow Deliveries To Certain Zip Codes, Tells AG: 'We're Protecting Drivers'
data.description: Amazon used third parties like UPS and the U.S. Postal Service to make deliveries in certain ZIP codes, a lawsuit alleges.

data.title: MicroStrategy Teams Up with Zebra to Boost Decision-Making with AI
data.description: Zebra selected MicroStrategy's cloud native platform for its Workcloud Workforce Optimization Suite, enhancing analysis and decision-making for retail customers through self-service reporting and AI capabilities.

data.title: Waymo Announces Expansion To Miami: How Soon Will Self-Driving Cars Hit The 'Magic City'?
data.description: Alphabet's Waymo expands to Miami, citing the city's reputation for innovation. Their autonomous vehicles will offer more accessible mobility.
